prompt_improvement_lines: Prompt: avoid actions outside allowed paths/tools and prefer bounded reversible fixes before restart.
Prompt: choose type/subtype/root IDs by matching required evidence; do not reuse a familiar category when the evidence map names another root cause.
Prompt: after diagnosing, include at least one state-changing allowed tool that matches the fault, not just diagnostics/restart.
